step_rationale: Intestinal metabolite mediating treatment response; pleiotropic, not atherothrombotic-step-specific.
mechanism: Ethanolamine metabolism is altered with acute coronary events and mediates intestinal-mediated cardioprotection.

references.title: Efficacy and Mechanism of Qianshan Huoxue Gao in Acute Coronary Syndrome via Regulation of Intestinal Flora and Metabolites.
